calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-11-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold W. Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff
Maria Ramos, Property Manager for Plaintiff, Salvador Segovia
Clarence Page, Defendant in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. The following terms were read into the record as follows:
Judgment for restitution and possession of premises to Plaintiff located at: 977 Folsom St. #5, SF, CA.
Lease forfeited.
Writ of possession stayed until 3/3/04 at 5pm.
If Defendant vacates by 3/3/05 at 5pm, Plaintiff waives back rent and unlawful detainer damages.
If Defendant does not vacate by 3/3/04 at 5pm, an amended judgment will be issued for back rent and damages for $5,653.12 plus costs of $292.30 for a total of $5,945.42
Jury trial vacated.
JPT: Tiela Chalmers (303A), Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
